SkillScope.description:
Portability scope of a skill.

``harness``: project-agnostic. Lives in ``workbay-system`` source of
             truth and is installed/symlinked into target repos by
             ``workbay-bootstrap``. Must not reference project-specific
             paths, package names, or domain terminology.
``project``: project-specific. Stays in the target repo's
             ``skills/`` (or its generated ``.claude/skills/``
             mirror) and is never hoisted by bootstrap. May freely
             reference project-local apps, packages, and
             conventions.
SkillScope.title: SkillScope

description: Required cross-repo fields on a skill's frontmatter.

description.description: One-line description used for skill matching.
description.title: Description

scope.description: Portability scope. 'harness' = installed into target repos by bootstrap; 'project' = stays local.

triggers.description: Optional list of trigger phrases or patterns the skill responds to.
triggers.title: Triggers

title: SkillManifest
